title: Funkcje okna: sumy narastające
intro: Licz running total i moving metrics.
explanation: SUM() OVER z ORDER BY wylicza sumę narastającą. Można zawężać okno przez ROWS BETWEEN dla analiz czasowych.

examples.query: SELECT order_date, amount, SUM(amount) OVER (ORDER BY order_date) AS running_total FROM daily_sales;
SELECT order_date, amount, AVG(amount) OVER (ORDER BY order_date ROWS BETWEEN 6 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS avg_7d FROM daily_sales;

exercise: Policz sumę narastającą wartości zamówień dla każdego klienta osobno.
solutionHints: PARTITION BY customer_id i ORDER BY created_at.
expectedQueryPatterns: SUM\(total\) OVER \(PARTITION BY customer_id ORDER BY created_at\)

validation.expectedSql: SELECT id, customer_id, created_at, total, SUM(total) OVER (PARTITION BY customer_id ORDER BY created_at) AS running_total FROM orders
